behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, function names (formatCellValue, formatClipboardValue, formatResults, etc.), expected behaviors, and CSS classes (flex-1, max-h-64, flex flex-col) are named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what must be true (single ContextMenu outside renderCell, use refs, memoize columns) without dictating exact code; agent still must design implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (formatCellValue/formatClipboardValue return values), file existence, grep for class names like flex-1, and AST depth of ContextMenu_Shadcn_ — all shared by valid alternative implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute npx tsx to import and call formatClipboardValue/formatCellValue, run pnpm prettier, and parse TSX via TypeScript AST — not pure text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: Behavioral tests require real implementations returning specific values (e.g., formatCellValue(null)==='NULL'); a stub returning default would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Single context menu requirement, utility function behaviors, QueryBlock flex-1 class, and prettier formatting are all tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are prefixed test_p2p_ vs behavioral, grouped with section comments (# ==== pass_to_pass tests ====, # ==== Behavioral tests ====), each with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies React/TS components, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers (ContextMenu_Shadcn_, Results.utils.ts, formatCellValue) are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the buggy files but that's reasonable scoping; does not specify line numbers or exact code replacements.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
